translation.en: O Lord of lords
O Opener of doors
O Causer of causes
O Giver of rewards
O Inspirer of right
O Creator of clouds
O Severe in punishment
O Swift in reckoning
O He to Whom is the return
O Forgiving, O Accepter of repentance

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O our Master
O our Protector
O our Helper
O our Guardian
O our Powerful One
O our Sustainer
O our Guide
O our Rescuer
O our God
O our Lord

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ

translation.en: O Best of those who remember and are remembered
translation.tr: Ey zikreden ve zikredilenlerin en hayırlısı

translation.en: O Best of those who thank and are thanked
translation.tr: Ey şükreden ve şükredilenlerin en hayırlısı

translation.en: O Best of those who praise and are praised
translation.tr: Ey hamd eden ve hamd edilenlerin en hayırlısı

translation.en: O Best of those who witness and are witnessed
translation.tr: Ey şahit olan ve şahit olunanların en hayırlısı

translation.en: O Best of those who call and are called upon
translation.tr: Ey davet eden ve davet edilenlerin en hayırlısı

translation.en: O Best of those who respond and are responded to
translation.tr: Ey icabet eden ve icabet edilenlerin en hayırlısı

translation.en: O Best of those who befriend and are befriended
translation.tr: Ey ünsiyet eden ve ünsiyet edilenlerin en hayırlısı

translation.en: O Best of companions and confidants
translation.tr: Ey arkadaş ve sohbet edenlerin en hayırlısı

translation.en: O Best of those sought and desired
translation.tr: Ey kastedilen ve talep edilenlerin en hayırlısı

translation.en: O Best of lovers and beloved
translation.tr: Ey seven ve sevilenlerin en hayırlısı

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ

translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَهْدِهِ وَفِيٌّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ʿahdihī wafiyy

translation.en: O He who is faithful in His covenant

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي وَفَائِهِ قَوِيٌّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī wafāʾihī qawiyy

translation.en: O He who is strong in His faithfulness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُوَّتِهِ عَلِيٌّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī quwwatihī ʿaliyy

translation.en: O He who is exalted in His power

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عُلُوِّهِ قَرِيبٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ʿuluwwihī qarīb

translation.en: O He who is near despite His exaltedness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُرْبِهِ لَطِيفٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī qurbihī laṭīf

translation.en: O He who is subtle in His nearness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي لُطْفِهِ شَرِيفٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī luṭfihī sharīf

translation.en: O He who is noble in His subtlety

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي شَرَفِهِ عَزِيزٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī sharafihī ʿazīz

translation.en: O He who is mighty in His nobility

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عِزِّهِ عَظِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ʿizzihī ʿaẓīm

translation.en: O He who is great in His might

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ مَجِيدٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ʿaẓamatihī majīd

translation.en: O He who is glorious in His greatness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي مَجْدِهِ حَمِيدٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī majdihī ḥamīd

translation.en: O He who is praiseworthy in His glory

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Sufficient for those who seek sufficiency from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden yeterlilik isteyene kâfi olan

translation.en: O Guide for those who seek guidance from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden hidayet isteyene yol gösteren

translation.en: O Protector of those who seek His protection
O Guardian of those who seek His guardianship
O Healer of those who seek healing from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden şifa isteyene şifa veren

translation.en: O Judge for those who seek His judgment
O Enricher of those who seek richness from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden zenginlik isteyeni zengin kılan

translation.en: O Fulfiller for those who seek fulfillment from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden ödeme isteyene tam ödeyen

translation.en: O Strengthener of those who seek strength from Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden kuvvet isteyene güç veren

translation.en: O Patron of those who seek His patronage
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden velayet isteyenin velisi olan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Beloved of those who endear themselves to Him
O Physician of those who seek remedy from Him
O Near to those who draw near to Him
O Watcher over those who wait expectantly for Him
O Answerer of those who supplicate to Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisine yalvaranların duasını kabul eden

translation.en: O Reckoner for those who rely on Him
O Granter to those who turn to Him
O Overcomer of those who face His punishment
translation.tr: Ey azabına maruz kalanları mağlup eden

lines.arabic: يَا دَلِيلَ مَنْ تَحَيَّرَ فِي أَمْرِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā dalīla man taḥayyara fī amrih

translation.en: O Guide for those who are perplexed in their affairs
translation.tr: Ey işinde şaşkına dönenin yol göstericisi

translation.en: O Companion of those who seek His intimacy

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Allah, O Most Gracious
O Most Merciful, O Most Generous
O Most Wise, O Eternal
O Most Great, O All-Knowing
O Most Forbearing, O Sound
O Self-Subsisting, O Everlasting
O Knower, O Ruler
O Divider, O Sound
O Majestic, O Beautiful
O Trustee, O Guarantor

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ دَعَاهُ مُجِيبٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa liman daʿāhu mujīb

translation.en: O He who responds to those who call upon Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisine dua edene icabet eden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ أَطَاعَهُ حَبِيبٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa liman aṭāʿahu ḥabīb

translation.en: O He who loves those who obey Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisine itaat edenin sevgilisi olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ أَحَبَّهُ قَرِيبٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa liman aḥabbahu qarīb

translation.en: O He who is near to those who love Him

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ أَرَادَهُ عَلِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa biman arādahu ʿalīm

translation.en: O He who knows those who desire Him

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ لِمَنْ رَجَاهُ كَرِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa liman rajāhu karīm

translation.en: O He who is generous to those who hope in Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden umut edene cömert olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِمَنْ عَصَاهُ حَلِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa biman ʿaṣāhu ḥalīm

translation.en: O He who is forbearing with those who disobey Him
translation.tr: Ey kendisine isyan edene halim olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِلْمِهِ حَكِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ḥilmihī ḥakīm

translation.en: O He who is wise in His forbearance

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حُكْمِهِ عَظِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ḥukmihī ʿaẓīm

translation.en: O He who is great in His judgment

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ رَحِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī ʿaẓamatihī raḥīm

translation.en: O He who is merciful in His greatness

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي إِحْسَانِهِ قَدِيمٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fī iḥsānihī qadīm

translation.en: O He who is eternal in His benevolence

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُشَاغِلُهُ سَمْعٌ عَنْ سَمْعٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yushāghiluhu samʿun ʿan samʿ

translation.en: O He whom one hearing does not distract from another
translation.tr: Ey bir işitme diğer işitmeden alıkoymayan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَمْنَعُهُ فِعْلٌ عَنْ فِعْلٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yamnaʿuhu fiʿlun ʿan fiʿl

translation.en: O He whom one act does not prevent from another
translation.tr: Ey bir fiil diğer fiilden alıkoymayan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُلْهِيهِ قَوْلٌ عَنْ قَوْلٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yulhīhi qawlun ʿan qawl

translation.en: O He whom one word does not divert from another
translation.tr: Ey bir söz diğer sözden meşgul etmeyen

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُغَلِّطُهُ سُؤَالٌ عَنْ سُؤَالٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yughalliṭuhu suʾālun ʿan suʾāl

translation.en: O He whom one question does not confuse with another
translation.tr: Ey bir soru diğer soruyla şaşırtmayan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُبْرِمُهُ إِلْحَاحُ الْمُلِحِّينَ

translation.en: O He whom the persistence of the persistent does not weary

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ شَرَحَ بِالْإِسْلَامِ صُدُورَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: O He who expanded the breasts of the believers with Islam
translation.tr: Ey müminlerin göğsünü İslam ile açan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَطَابَ بِذِكْرِهِ قُلُوبَ الْمُخْبِتِينَ

translation.en: O He who sweetened the hearts of the humble with His remembrance
translation.tr: Ey zikriyle mütevazilerin kalplerini hoş eden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَغِيبُ عَنْ قُلُوبِ الْمُشْتَاقِينَ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yaghību ʿan qulūbi'l-mushtāqīn

translation.en: O He who is never absent from the hearts of the yearning
O Ultimate desire of the seekers

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yakhfā ʿalayhi shayʾun fi'l-ʿālamīn

translation.en: O He from whom nothing is hidden in the worlds
translation.tr: Ey âlemlerde hiçbir şey gizli kalmayan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.transliteration: Yā mubdiʾa kulli shayʾin wa muʿīdah

translation.en: O Originator of all things and their Restorer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi başlatan ve iade eden

lines.transliteration: Yā musabbiba kulli shayʾin wa muqaddirah

translation.en: O Causer of all things and their Ordainer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin sebebini yaratan ve takdir eden

lines.transliteration: Yā mukawwina kulli shayʾin wa muqaddirah

translation.en: O Former of all things and their Decreer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi oluşturan ve takdir eden

lines.transliteration: Yā murabbiya kulli shayʾin wa mudabbirah

translation.en: O Nurturer of all things and their Director
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi terbiye eden ve idare eden

lines.transliteration: Yā mukawwira kulli shayʾin wa muḥawwilah

translation.en: O Shaper of all things and their Transformer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi şekillendiren ve dönüştüren

lines.transliteration: Yā muḥyiya kulli shayʾin wa mumītah

translation.en: O Giver of life to all things and their Taker
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi dirilten ve öldüren

lines.transliteration: Yā khāliqa kulli shayʾin wa ṣāniʿah

translation.en: O Creator of all things and their Maker
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi yaratan ve yapan

lines.transliteration: Yā qābiḍa kulli shayʾin wa bāsiṭah

translation.en: O Withholder of all things and their Expander
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi daraltan ve genişleten

lines.transliteration: Yā munshiʾa kulli shayʾin wa muqaddirah

translation.en: O Initiator of all things and their Measurer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi inşa eden ve ölçen

lines.transliteration: Yā muṣarrifa kulli shayʾin wa mudabbirah

translation.en: O Disposer of all things and their Administrator
translation.tr: Ey her şeyi çekip çeviren ve yöneten

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He whose knowledge precedes all
translation.tr: Ey ilmi her şeyden önce olan

translation.en: O He whose promise is true
O He whose gentleness is manifest
O He whose command prevails
O He whose book is firm
O He whose decree is certain
O He whose Quran is glorious
O He whose sovereignty is eternal
O He whose grace is everlasting
O He whose throne is mighty

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Companion of the strangers
O Subduer of the enemies
O Raiser of the heavens
O Remover of affliction
O Beloved of the pious
O Intimate of the saints
O Treasure of the poor
O God of the rich
O Most Generous of the generous
O Most Munificent of the munificent

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Great in rank
O Eternal in benevolence
O Abundant in blessings
O Beautiful in expression
O Majestic in proof
O Exalted above all imperfection
translation.tr: Ey her türlü noksanlıktan münezzeh olan

translation.en: O Hearer of every complaint
O Witness of every secret conversation
translation.tr: Ey her gizli konuşmaya şahit olan

translation.en: O Rescuer of every drowning one
O Savior of every distressed one

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Present One who is never absent
translation.tr: Ey hazır olup asla gaip olmayan

translation.en: O Near One who is never far
translation.tr: Ey yakın olup asla uzak olmayan

translation.en: O Intimate who never alienates
translation.tr: Ey dost olup asla yabancılık vermeyen

translation.en: O Living One who never dies
O Self-Subsisting who never sleeps
O Eternal who never perishes

lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin niʿmatuh

translation.en: O He whose blessings are seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ رَحْمَتُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin raḥmatuh

translation.en: O He whose mercy is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ صَنْعَتُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin ṣanʿatuh

translation.en: O He whose craftsmanship is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ لُطْفُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin luṭfuh

translation.en: O He whose gentleness is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ عِلْمُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin ʿilmuh

translation.en: O He whose knowledge is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَدْلُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin ʿadluh

translation.en: O He whose justice is seen in all things

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرَى فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ فَضْلُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yurā fī kulli shayʾin faḍluh

translation.en: O He whose grace is seen in all things

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَحَدٌ بِلَا ضِدٍّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa aḥadun bilā ḍidd

translation.en: O He who is One without opposite

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فَرْدٌ بِلَا نِدٍّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa fardun bilā nidd

translation.en: O He who is Single without equal

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ صَمَدٌ بِلَا عَيْبٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ṣamadun bilā ʿayb

translation.en: O He who is Self-Sufficient without defect

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ وِتْرٌ بِلَا كَيْفٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa witrun bilā kayf

translation.en: O He who is Odd without how

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَاضٍ بِلَا حَيْفٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa qāḍin bilā ḥayf

translation.en: O He who judges without injustice

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ رَبٌّ بِلَا وَزِيرٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa rabbun bilā wazīr

translation.en: O He who is Lord without minister

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَزِيزٌ بِلَا ذُلٍّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ʿazīzun bilā dhull

translation.en: O He who is Mighty without humiliation

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ غَنِيٌّ بِلَا فَقْرٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ghaniyyun bilā faqr

translation.en: O He who is Rich without poverty

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مَلِكٌ بِلَا عَزْلٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa malikun bilā ʿazl

translation.en: O He who is King without dismissal

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مَوْصُوفٌ بِلَا شَبِيهٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa mawṣūfun bilā shabīh

translation.en: O He who is described without likeness

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا خَالِقَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ

translation.en: O Creator of those in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerde ve yerde olanları yaratan

lines.arabic: يَا رَازِقَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ

translation.en: O Sustainer of those in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerde ve yerde olanlara rızık veren

lines.arabic: يَا مَالِكَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ

translation.en: O Owner of those in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerde ve yerde olanların sahibi

lines.arabic: يَا مُدَبِّرَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ

translation.en: O Director of those in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerde ve yerde olanları idare eden

translation.en: O Light of the heavens and the earth
O Adornment of the heavens and the earth
O Pillar of the heavens and the earth
O Originator of the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerin ve yerin yoktan yaratıcısı

translation.en: O Wondrous Maker of the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey göklerin ve yerin eşsiz yaratıcısı

translation.en: O Lord of Majesty and Generosity

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ يَا سَتَّارُ
lines.transliteration: Allāhumma innī asʾaluka bi-ismika yā Sattār

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You by Your name, O Concealer
O Oft-Forgiving
O Subduer
O Compeller
O Most Patient
O Benign
O Chooser
O Opener
O Granter of bountiful gifts
O One at rest

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He who created me and shaped me
O He who sustained me and nurtured me
translation.tr: Ey bana rızık verip terbiye eden

translation.en: O He who fed me and gave me drink
O He who drew me near and brought me close
O He who protected me and sufficed me
O He who preserved me and guarded me
O He who honored me and enriched me
translation.tr: Ey beni aziz kılıp zengin eden

translation.en: O He who granted me success and guided me
translation.tr: Ey beni muvaffak kılıp hidayet eden

translation.en: O He who befriended me and sheltered me
O He who causes me to die and gives me life

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He who establishes truth by His words

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَقْبَلُ التَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِ

translation.en: O He who accepts repentance from His servants

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَحُولُ بَيْنَ الْمَرْءِ وَقَلْبِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yaḥūlu bayna'l-marʾi wa qalbih

translation.en: O He who comes between a person and their heart
translation.tr: Ey kişi ile kalbi arasına giren

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تَنْفَعُ الشَّفَاعَةُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā tanfaʿu'sh-shafāʿatu illā bi-idhnih

translation.en: O He without whose permission intercession avails not
translation.tr: Ey izni olmadan şefaatin fayda vermediği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنْ ضَلَّ عَنْ سَبِيلِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa aʿlamu biman ḍalla ʿan sabīlih

translation.en: O He who knows best who has strayed from His path
translation.tr: Ey yolundan sapanı en iyi bilen

translation.en: O He whose judgment none can reverse
O He whose decree none can repel
translation.tr: Ey kazasını geri çevirecek kimse olmayan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِأَمْرِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man inqāda kullu shayʾin li-amrih

translation.en: O He to whose command all things submit
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin emrine boyun eğdiği

translation.en: O He in whose right hand the heavens are folded
translation.tr: Ey göklerin sağ elinde dürülü olduğu

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُرْسِلُ الرِّيَاحَ بُشْراً بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَحْمَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yursilu'r-riyāḥa bushran bayna yaday raḥmatih

translation.en: O He who sends the winds as glad tidings before His mercy
translation.tr: Ey rahmetinin önünde müjdeciler olarak rüzgârları gönderen

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He who made the earth a resting place
O He who made the mountains as pegs
O He who made the sun a lamp
O He who made the moon a light
O He who made the night a garment
O He who made the day for livelihood
O He who made sleep for rest
O He who made the sky a canopy
O He who made things in pairs
O He who made the Fire a place of ambush

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Allah, O One
O Glorious
O Witness
O Guide to right
O Praiser
O Inheritor
O Distresser
O Benefiter
O Resurrector
O Master

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Best known One who has been known
O Best worshipped One who has been worshipped
O Best thanked One who has been thanked
O Best remembered One who has been remembered
O Best praised One who has been praised
O Best existing One who has been sought
O Best asked One who has given
O Best Benefactor who has bestowed
O Best Responder who has responded
O Best Patron who has cared

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تَوَاضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِعَظَمَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man tawāḍaʿa kullu shayʾin li-ʿaẓamatih

translation.en: O He before whose greatness all things humble themselves
translation.tr: Ey azametine karşı her şeyin alçaldığı

lines.arabic: يَا مَنِ اسْتَسْلَمَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِقُدْرَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man istaslama kullu shayʾin li-qudratih

translation.en: O He to whose power all things surrender
translation.tr: Ey kudretine karşı her şeyin teslim olduğu

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَضَعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِهَيْبَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man khaḍaʿa kullu shayʾin li-haybatih

translation.en: O He before whose awe all things bow
translation.tr: Ey heybetine karşı her şeyin boyun eğdiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنِ انْقَادَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِعِزَّتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man inqāda kullu shayʾin li-ʿizzatih

translation.en: O He to whose might all things submit
translation.tr: Ey izzetine karşı her şeyin itaat ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ ذَلَّ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِمُلْكِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man dhalla kullu shayʾin li-mulkih

translation.en: O He before whose sovereignty all things are humbled
translation.tr: Ey mülküne karşı her şeyin zelil olduğu

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَافَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ مِنْ خَشْيَتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man khāfa kullu shayʾin min khashyatih

translation.en: O He whom all things fear from His awe

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ شَهِدَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ لِرُبُوبِيَّتِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man shahida kullu shayʾin li-rubūbiyyatih

translation.en: O He whose lordship all things bear witness to
translation.tr: Ey rububiyetine her şeyin şahitlik ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ سَبَّحَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ بِحَمْدِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man sabbaḥa kullu shayʾin bi-ḥamdih

translation.en: O He whom all things glorify with His praise
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin hamd ile tesbih ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ فَزِعَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ إِلَيْهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man faziʿa kullu shayʾin ilayh

translation.en: O He to whom all things turn in panic

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ قَامَ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ بِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man qāma kullu shayʾin bih

translation.en: O He by whom all things subsist
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin kendisiyle ayakta durduğu

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Forgiver of sins
O Remover of troubles
O Ultimate of goals
O Bestower of abundant gifts
O Vast in forgiveness
O Spreader of blessings
O Hearer of voices
O Knower of hidden things
O Repeller of calamities
O Raiser of ranks

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ يَا شَفِيقُ
lines.transliteration: Allāhumma innī asʾaluka bi-ismika yā Shafīq

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You by Your name, O Compassionate
O Gentle Companion
O Preserver
O All-Encompassing
O Sustainer
O Rescuer
O Bestower of honor
O Abaser
O Originator
O Restorer

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الرَّحْمٰنُ الرَّحِيمُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'r-Raḥmānu'r-Raḥīm

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Rahman, Rahim

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْمَلِكُ الْقُدُّوسُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'l-Maliku'l-Quddūs

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the King, the Holy
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Melik, Kuddüs

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'l-ʿAzīzu'l-Ḥakīm

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the Mighty, the Wise
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Aziz, Hakim

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'l-Ḥayyu'l-Qayyūm

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the Living, the Self-Subsisting
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Hayy, Kayyum

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa ʿālimu'l-ghaybi wa'sh-shahāda

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, Knower of the unseen and the seen
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan gayb ve şehadeti bilen

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْخَالِقُ الْبَارِئُ الْمُصَوِّرُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'l-Khāliqu'l-Bāriʾu'l-Muṣawwir

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the Creator, the Maker, the Fashioner
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Halik, Bari, Musavvir

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْأَوَّلُ وَالْآخِرُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'l-Awwalu wa'l-Ākhir

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the First and the Last
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Evvel ve Ahir

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الظَّاهِرُ وَالْبَاطِنُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa'ẓ-Ẓāhiru wa'l-Bāṭin

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, the Manifest and the Hidden
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Zahir ve Batın

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa yuḥyī wa yumīt

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, He gives life and causes death
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan dirilten ve öldüren

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā ilāha illā huwa wa huwa ʿalā kulli shayʾin qadīr

translation.en: O He, there is no god but Him, and He has power over all things
translation.tr: Ey kendisinden başka ilah olmayan ve her şeye gücü yeten

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ السَّبْعُ وَالْأَرْضُ وَمَنْ فِيهِنَّ
lines.transliteration: Yā man tusabbiḥu lahu's-samāwātu's-sabʿu wa'l-arḍu wa man fīhinn

translation.en: O He whom the seven heavens and the earth and those within glorify
translation.tr: Ey yedi kat gök, yer ve içindekiler tesbih eden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْجِبَالُ وَالْأَشْجَارُ

translation.en: O He whom the mountains and trees glorify
translation.tr: Ey dağların ve ağaçların tesbih ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الطُّيُورُ فِي أَوْكَارِهَا
lines.transliteration: Yā man tusabbiḥu lahu'ṭ-ṭuyūru fī awkārihā

translation.en: O He whom the birds glorify in their nests

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْوُحُوشُ فِي قِفَارِهَا
lines.transliteration: Yā man tusabbiḥu lahu'l-wuḥūshu fī qifārihā

translation.en: O He whom the wild beasts glorify in their deserts
translation.tr: Ey vahşi hayvanların çöllerde tesbih ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْحِيتَانُ فِي بِحَارِهَا
lines.transliteration: Yā man tusabbiḥu lahu'l-ḥītānu fī biḥārihā

translation.en: O He whom the whales glorify in their seas

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ الْمُقَرَّبُونَ

translation.en: O He whom the nearest angels glorify

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُ لَهُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ

translation.en: O He whom the thunder glorifies with His praise
translation.tr: Ey gök gürültüsünün hamd ile tesbih ettiği

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُسَبِّحُ لَهُ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā man yusabbiḥu lahu kullu shayʾ

translation.en: O He whom everything glorifies
O He who is the One, the Self-Sufficient

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُواً أَحَدٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lam yalid wa lam yūlad wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan aḥad

translation.en: O He who begets not nor was begotten and there is none equal to Him
translation.tr: Ey doğurmayan, doğurulmayan ve hiçbir dengi olmayan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Excellent Reckoner
O Excellent Physician
O Excellent Watcher
O Excellent Near One
O Excellent Responder
O Excellent Beloved
O Excellent Guarantor
O Excellent Trustee
O Excellent Protector
O Excellent Helper

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Joy of the knowers
O Desire of the lovers
O Intimate of the seekers
O Beloved of the penitent
O Sustainer of the destitute
O Hope of the sinners
O Delight of the worshippers' eyes
O Reliever of the distressed
O Remover of grief from the sorrowful
O God of the first and the last

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O our Lord
O our God
O our Master
O our Succor
O Sufficient for us
O our Guardian
O our Helper
O our Guide
O our Aider
O our Beloved

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He who is the One, the Unique
O He who is the One, the Singular
O He who is the Self-Sufficient, the Sought
O He who is the All-Knowing, the All-Aware
O He who is the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing
O He who is the Subtle, the All-Aware
O He who is the Compassionate, the Merciful
O He who is the Mighty, the Wise
O He who is the Good, the Merciful
translation.tr: Ey Birr sahibi ve Rahîm olan

translation.en: O He who is the Forgiving, the Loving

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Lord of the Glorious Throne
O Doer of whatever He wills
O Guide of every lost one
O Patron of every oppressed one
O Helper of every forsaken one
O Merciful to every poor one
O Comforter of every lonely one
O Companion of every stranger
O Remover of every distress
O Mender of every broken one

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Reliever of worry
O Remover of sorrow
O Forgiver of sin
O Accepter of repentance
O Creator of creation
O Truthful in promise
O Sustainer of the child
O Warner of creation
O Sender of rain
O Director of affairs

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْمُلْكِ عَظِيمٌ

translation.en: O He who is great in sovereignty

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْعَظَمَةِ كَرِيمٌ

translation.en: O He who is generous in grandeur

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الرَّحْمَةِ قَدِيمٌ

translation.en: O He who is eternal in mercy

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الثَّنَاءِ حَمِيدٌ

translation.en: O He who is praiseworthy in glorification

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْجُودِ مَجِيدٌ

translation.en: O He who is glorious in generosity

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْبَطْشِ شَدِيدٌ

translation.en: O He who is severe in striking

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْأُمُورِ حَكِيمٌ

translation.en: O He who is wise in matters

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْعِلْمِ عَلِيمٌ

translation.en: O He who is knowing in knowledge

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْحُكْمِ عَدْلٌ

translation.en: O He who is just in judgment

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي الْغِنَاءِ وَاسِعٌ

translation.en: O He who is vast in richness

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ

translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Lord of Majesty and Beauty
O Lord of Might and Perfection
O Lord of Power and Bounty
O Lord of Glory and Perfection
O Lord of Grace and Graciousness
O Lord of Strength and Deeds
O Lord of Giving and Bestowing
O Lord of Mercy and Gentleness
O Lord of Favor and Giving
O Lord of Splendor and Radiance

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا إِلٰهَ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَنْ فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā ilāha man fi's-samāʾi wa man fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O God of those in heaven and those on earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanların İlahı

lines.arabic: يَا خَالِقَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā khāliqa mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Creator of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanların Yaratıcısı

lines.arabic: يَا رَبَّ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā rabba mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Lord of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanların Rabbi

lines.arabic: يَا مَالِكَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā mālika mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Sovereign of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanların Maliki

lines.arabic: يَا رَازِقَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā rāziqa mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Sustainer of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanlara rızık veren

lines.arabic: يَا نُورَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā nūra mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Light of what is in the heavens and the earth

lines.arabic: يَا حَافِظَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā ḥāfiẓa mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Preserver of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanları koruyan

lines.arabic: يَا قَاهِرَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā qāhira mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Subduer of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanları kahreden

lines.arabic: يَا مُدَبِّرَ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā mudabbira mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Director of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanları idare eden

lines.arabic: يَا بَاقِيَ بَعْدَ فَنَاءِ مَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
lines.transliteration: Yā bāqiya baʿda fanāʾi mā fi's-samāʾi wa mā fi'l-arḍ

translation.en: O Remaining after the perishing of what is in the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökte ve yerde olanlar fani olduktan sonra baki kalan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ

translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He who transforms states and conditions
O He who accepts excuses and requests
translation.tr: Ey özür ve istekleri kabul eden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَعْفُو عَنِ الذُّنُوبِ وَالْأَوْزَارِ

translation.en: O He who pardons sins and burdens
translation.tr: Ey günahları ve ağır yükleri affeden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُفْسِدُ عَلَيْهِ تَدْبِيرُهُ مُدَبِّرٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā man lā yufsidu ʿalayhi tadbīruhu mudabbir

translation.en: O He whose plan no planner can spoil

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعِيدُ الْخَلْقَ كَمَا بَدَأَهُ

translation.en: O He who restores creation as He originated it
translation.tr: Ey yaratılışı başlattığı gibi iade eden

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ حَكَمٌ لَا يَجُورُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ḥakamun lā yajūr

translation.en: O He who is a Judge who never oppresses

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَدْلٌ لَا يَحِيفُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ʿadlun lā yaḥīf

translation.en: O He who is just and never wrongs

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ غَنِيٌّ لَا يَفْتَقِرُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ghaniyyun lā yaftaqir

translation.en: O He who is rich and never becomes poor

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ كَبِيرٌ لَا يُوصَفُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa kabīrun lā yūṣaf

translation.en: O He who is great beyond description

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَزِيزٌ لَا يُضَامُ
lines.transliteration: Yā man huwa ʿazīzun lā yuḍām

translation.en: O He who is mighty and never wronged

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ أَوَّلُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَآخِرُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Awwalu kulli shay'in wa ākhiruh

translation.en: O He Who is the First of everything and its Last
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin evveli ve âhiri olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ ظَاهِرُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَبَاطِنُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Ẓāhiru kulli shay'in wa bāṭinuh

translation.en: O He Who is the Manifest of everything and its Hidden
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin zâhiri ve bâtını olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُمِيتُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Khāliqu kulli shay'in wa mumītuh

translation.en: O He Who is the Creator of everything and its Destroyer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin yaratıcısı ve yok edicisi olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَالِمُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُخْبِرُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa 'Ālimu kulli shay'in wa mukhbiruh

translation.en: O He Who is the Knower of everything and its Informer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin bileni ve haber vereni olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ رَازِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُيَسِّرُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Rāziqu kulli shay'in wa muyassiruh

translation.en: O He Who is the Provider of everything and its Facilitator
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin rızık vereni ve kolaylaştıranı olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مَالِكُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَحَاكِمُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Māliku kulli shay'in wa ḥākimuh

translation.en: O He Who is the Owner of everything and its Ruler
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin sahibi ve hâkimi olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُبْدِئُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُعِيدُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Mubdi'u kulli shay'in wa mu'īduh

translation.en: O He Who is the Originator of everything and its Restorer
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin başlatanı ve iade edeni olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُنْشِئُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُقَدِّرُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Munshi'u kulli shay'in wa muqaddiruh

translation.en: O He Who is the Causer of everything and its Former
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin inşa edeni ve takdir edeni olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ مُحْيِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمُمِيتُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Muḥyī kulli shay'in wa mumītuh

translation.en: O He Who is the Giver of life to everything and its Taker
translation.tr: Ey her şeye hayat veren ve onu alan olan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَوَارِثُهُ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man huwa Khāliqu kulli shay'in wa wārithuh

translation.en: O He Who is the Creator of everything and its Inheritor
translation.tr: Ey her şeyin yaratıcısı ve vârisi olan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yadhkuru wa lā yansā

translation.en: O He Who remembers and is not forgetful

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yakhluqu wa lā yukhlaq

translation.en: O He Who creates and is not created

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yahdī wa lā yuhdā

translation.en: O He Who guides and is not guided
translation.tr: Ey hidayet eden ve hidayete muhtaç olmayan

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yuḥyī wa lā yamūt

translation.en: O He Who gives life and does not die

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yarzuqu wa lā yurzaq

translation.en: O He Who provides and is not provided for

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yuṭ'imu wa lā yuṭ'am

translation.en: O He Who feeds and is not fed

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُجِيرُ وَلَا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yujīru wa lā yujāru 'alayh

translation.en: O He Who protects and is not protected
translation.tr: Ey koruyan ve korunmaya muhtaç olmayan

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَقْضِي وَلَا يُقْضَى عَلَيْهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yaqḍī wa lā yuqḍā 'alayh

translation.en: O He Who decrees and is not decreed upon

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَحْكُمُ وَلَا يُحْكَمُ عَلَيْهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yaḥkumu wa lā yuḥkamu 'alayh

translation.en: O He Who judges and is not judged

lines.transliteration: Yā Man yabqā wa lā yafnā

translation.en: O He Who is Eternal and does not perish
translation.tr: Ey bâkî olan ve fânî olmayan

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Best Helper
O Best Judge
O Best Companion
O Best Beloved
O Best Master
O Best Guide
O Best Healer
O Best Responder
O Best Guardian
O Best Enricher

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي قُدْرَتِهِ عَزِيزٌ

translation.en: O He Who is in power and is Mighty

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي حِكْمَتِهِ عَلِيمٌ

translation.en: O He Who is concealed and is All-Knowing

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ فِي عِبَادَتِهِ شَكُورٌ

translation.en: O He Who is worshipped and is Thankful

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عِنْدَ مَعْصِيَتِهِ غَفُورٌ

translation.en: O He Who is disobeyed and is Forgiving
O He Who is not contained in thought
O He Who is not perceived by sight

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يَخْفَى عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ

translation.en: O He Who is not hidden from anything
translation.tr: Ey hiçbir şey Kendisine gizli kalmayan

translation.en: O He Who is not mixed with doubt
O He Who is the Creator of the human being

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ فِي مُلْكِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā sharīka lahū fī mulkih

translation.en: O He Who has no partner in His sovereignty

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَا رَحِيمُ
lines.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as'aluka bi'smika yā Raḥmānu yā Raḥīm

translation.en: O Allah, I ask You by Your Name, O Compassionate, O Merciful
translation.tr: Allah'ım, isminin hakkı için Senden istiyorum, ey Rahmân, ey Rahîm

translation.en: O Eternal, O Self-Subsisting
O Majestic, O Generous
O Beautiful, O Sovereign
O Nourisher, O Responder
O Opener, O Knower
O Reducer, O Expander
O Abaser, O Exalter
O Honorer, O Humiliator
O All-Hearing, O All-Seeing

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ وَسِعَتْ رَحْمَتُهُ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man wasi'at raḥmatuhū kulla shay'

translation.en: O He Whose mercy encompasses everything
O He Whose mercy precedes His wrath
O He Whose mercy encompasses all creation
O He Whose mercy is a treasure for the sincere
translation.tr: Ey rahmeti ihlâs sahipleri için hazine olan

translation.en: O He Who sent His messengers with mercy
O He Who revealed His books with mercy

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَرْجُو رَحْمَتَهُ كُلُّ الْخَلَائِقِ

translation.en: O He Whose mercy is sought by all creation

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَطْمَعُ فِي رَحْمَتِهِ الْمُذْنِبُونَ

translation.en: O He Whose mercy is hoped for by sinners

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تَنْقَطِعُ رَحْمَتُهُ أَبَدًا
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā tanqaṭi'u raḥmatuhū abadā

translation.en: O He Whose mercy has no end

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ جَعَلَ الرَّحْمَةَ فِي قُلُوبِ عِبَادِهِ

translation.en: O He Who placed mercy in the hearts of His servants

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He in Whom the fearful find refuge
O He in Whom the hopeful find hope
O He in Whom the seekers find guidance
O He in Whom the striving ones find assistance
O He in Whom the oppressed find justice
O He in Whom the believers find tranquility
O He in Whom the repentant find acceptance
O He in Whom the asking ones find generosity
O He in Whom the weak find strength
O He in Whom the needy find sufficiency

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ بِغَيْرِ عَمَدٍ

translation.en: O He Who created the heavens without pillars
O He Who spread the earth as a dwelling
O He Who placed the mountains as pegs
O He Who made the sun a lamp
O He Who made the moon a light
O He Who made the stars for guidance
O He Who made the sea serviceable
O He Who made the rivers flow
O He Who made the springs gush forth

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَلَقَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ أَزْوَاجًا
lines.transliteration: Yā Man khalaqa kulla shay'in azwājā

translation.en: O He Who created everything in pairs

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَحَاطَ عِلْمُهُ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man aḥāṭa 'ilmuhū bi kulli shay'

translation.en: O He Whose knowledge encompasses all things
O He Whose patience encompasses the sinners
O He Whose generosity encompasses the needy
O He Whose blessings encompass all creation
O He Whose kingdom has no end

lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā ḥadda li jalālih

translation.en: O He Whose glory has no limit
O He Whose perfection cannot be described
O He Whose grandeur cannot be perceived
O He Whose decree cannot be repelled
O He Whose attributes cannot be enumerated

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Who gives to those who ask

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعْطِي مَنْ لَمْ يَسْأَلْهُ تَفَضُّلًا
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yu'ṭī man lam yas'alhu tafaḍḍulā

translation.en: O He Who gives to those who do not ask, out of His mercy

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعْطِي الْفَرَجَ بَعْدَ الشِّدَّةِ

translation.en: O He Who gives comfort after hardship

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعْطِي الْهُدَى بَعْدَ الضَّلَالَةِ

translation.en: O He Who gives guidance after misguidance

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعْطِي الْعَفْوَ بَعْدَ الذَّنْبِ

translation.en: O He Who gives pardon after sin

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ يُعْطِي النِّعَمَ بِغَيْرِ سُؤَالٍ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man yu'ṭī'n-ni'ama bi ghayri su'āl

translation.en: O He Who gives blessings without being asked
O He Who is the most Generous of the generous
O He Who is the most Knowing of the knowledgeable
O He Who is the most Powerful of the powerful
O He Who is the most Merciful of those who show mercy

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Originator of the heavens
O Creator of darkness and light
O Author of glory and generosity
O Author of majesty and beauty

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا صَاحِبَةَ لَهُ وَلَا وَلَدٌ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā ṣāḥibata lahū wa lā walad

translation.en: O He Who has no consort and no child

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ فِي الْمُلْكِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā sharīka lahū fi'l-mulk

translation.en: O He Who has no partner in sovereignty

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا وَزِيرَ لَهُ فِي سُلْطَانِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā wazīra lahū fī sulṭānih

translation.en: O He Who has no minister in His authority

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا مُشِيرَ لَهُ فِي حُكْمِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā mushīra lahū fī ḥukmih

translation.en: O He Who has no advisor in His rule

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا مَثِيلَ لَهُ فِي خَلْقِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā mathīla lahū fī khalqih

translation.en: O He Who has no likeness in His creation

lines.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا نَظِيرَ لَهُ فِي وُجُودِهِ
lines.transliteration: Yā Man lā naẓīra lahū fī wujūdih

translation.en: O He Who has no equal in His existence

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O He Whose treasures never diminish
O He Whose kingdom never ends
O He Whose blessings cannot be counted
O He Whose wisdom cannot be fathomed
O He Whose mercy cannot be measured
O He Whose generosity cannot be repaid
O He Whose power cannot be overcome
O He Whose authority cannot be challenged
O He Whose attributes cannot be comprehended
O He Whose greatness cannot be imagined

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Allah, O Most Merciful
O Most Compassionate, O Most Holy
O Sovereign, O Source of Peace
O Guardian of Faith, O Protector
O Almighty, O Compeller
O Supreme, O Creator
O Originator, O Fashioner
O Forgiver, O Subduer
O Bestower, O Provider
O Opener, O All-Knowing

closing.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ يَا لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ الْأَمَانَ الْأَمَانَ خَلِّصْنَا مِنَ النَّارِ
closing.transliteration: Subḥānaka yā lā ilāha illā anta al-amān al-amān khalliṣnā mina'n-nār

translation.en: Glory be to You, there is no god but You. Safety, safety! Deliver us from the Fire.
translation.tr: Sen her türlü eksiklikten münezzehsin. Senden başka ilah yoktur. Emân ver bize, emân ver. Bizi cehennemden kurtar.

translation.en: O Light of the heavens and the earth
O Beautifier of the heavens and the earth
O Creator of the heavens and the earth
O Originator of the heavens and the earth
translation.tr: Ey gökleri ve yeri yoktan var eden

translation.en: O He Who illuminates the heavens and the earth
O Key of the heavens and the earth
O Designer of the heavens and the earth
